message:
bd-37a.4: VOI-gated sampling observability layer

Add tracing spans, structured logs, and monotonic counters to the VOI
sampling module for runtime observability:

- TRACING: span 'voi.evaluate' with decision_context, voi_estimate,
  sample_cost, sample_decision fields
- LOG: DEBUG for VOI calculations and histogram estimate, TRACE for
  individual utility estimates after observation
- METRICS: static atomic counters voi_samples_taken_total and
  voi_samples_skipped_total with public accessors
- Re-export counter accessors from ftui_runtime root
- 10 new inline tests: span field assertions (3), DEBUG log assertions (2),
  TRACE log assertions (1), counter verification (3), monotonicity (1)

All 57 voi_sampling tests pass (47 existing + 10 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
